<!--
PR title MUST be a Conventional Commit, e.g. "feat: add recurring overlap guard" or "fix: queue precedence".
It drives the auto-generated release notes. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## What & why


## Checklist
- [ ] PR title is a Conventional Commit (`feat:` / `fix:` / `docs:` / `refactor:` / `test:` / `chore:` / `ci:` / `build:` / `perf:`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated; `dotnet test` passes (≥80% line coverage)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or the public API changed
